new_value: {"notes":"Strategy: No visible conflicts in current clean state on worker6 branch (post tqv9 hal/l2 fixes). For future merges: 1. Prefer -X theirs for coap/senml/rpl from latest worker. 2. Always preserve latest test/vectors/*.json and spec/*.md by manual diff review. 3. Never manually edit .beads/*; let bd commands and git merge --strategy-option handle events JSONL. 4.
